# Mike's Mobile Auto Repair (MMAR Care)

> Mobile auto repair and maintenance across Southwest Florida — Lee, Collier, and Charlotte counties. We come to you: home, work, or roadside. Servicing all makes and models with a warranty-backed guarantee.

Mike's Mobile Auto Repair operates as MMAR Care, offering on-site diagnostics, brake service, oil changes, batteries, AC repair, check-engine-light diagnostics, and pre-purchase inspections. Customers can book online, request quotes, subscribe to the MMAR Care maintenance plan, and manage vehicles/appointments through a customer portal. Contact: (813) 501-7572.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mobile mechanic overview, service coverage, and how to book.
- [About](/about): The MMAR story, service philosophy, and warranty commitments.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of mobile services offered.
- [Service Areas](/service-areas): Southwest Florida cities and neighborhoods we serve.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Verified customer reviews and testimonials.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, text, and service-request information.
- [Book Service](/book): Schedule a mobile service appointment.
- [MMAR Care](/mmar-care): Monthly maintenance membership plans.
- [Fleet Services](/fleet): Mobile maintenance and repair for business fleets.
- [Blog](/blog): Auto-care guides and Southwest Florida car ownership tips.
- [Warranty Policy](/warranty-policy): Repair warranty terms and Magnuson-Moss compliance.
- [Lee County Mobile Mechanic](/lee-county-fl): Countywide coverage detail.
- [Install App](/install): Install the MMAR Care progressive web app.
